notes: Could not satisfy Rule 0 surname-char match for 于. Strongest English-name candidate is github.com/yujiachen-y (display name 'Jiachen Yu', email yu.jiachen@outlook.com per https://www.yujiachen.com/about/, recent activity 2026-04-26 within 30d, career Megvii->Airbnb->ByteDance Lark->OpusClip, HDU alumni from HDU_OS_Assignment_2017 repo, also tweets at twitter.com/yujiachen_y, Xiaohongshu profile 68f9ad5a000000003702ac7c). However the personal site, GitHub profile, About page (zh & en), and all linked posts NEVER display the surname character — every 于 occurrence on the zh-About is the preposition (拜辞于/莫过于/关于), not a name. Pinyin 'Yu' here is ambiguous: confirmed counterexamples found during search include 俞家琛 (Princeton/Stanford physicist Jiachen Yu, scholar.google profile Iu5oza8AAAAJ explicitly shows 俞家琛) and 余家琛 (facebook.com/timlesyu, English name 'Jiachen Yu (余家琛)'). Direct search for '于佳辰' returns zero results pointing to this engineer. With three real distinct people sharing pinyin 'Jiachen Yu' across distinct surname chars 于/余/俞, and no character anchor on the candidate's identity, char-match cannot be confirmed. Per Rule 0 + Rule 4 (better empty than wrong), skip. Tried: HF (JiachenYu/YUJIACHEN/JCYu/yujiachen-y — JiachenYu is bytedance-research org member but no Chinese chars on profile), GitHub API + repo READMEs, personal site about-zh/about-en, blog posts (learnings-from-bytedance, 2024-year-in-review), Google Scholar, arxiv, LinkedIn, Wayback (no snapshots for twitter.com/yujiachen_y or yujiachen.com), Nitter mirrors (blocked), direct quoted '于佳辰' web search.
